title: Principal Instructional Designer at CL Educate

jsonLd.title: Principal Instructional Designer at CL Educate
jsonLd.description:
CL Educate invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Instructional Designer at our Lucknow location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About CL Educate:
CL Educate is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in Data Analysis
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in E-learning

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Professional development and training programs
• Flexible working hours
• Referral bonus program
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Lucknow, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with CL Educate!
